candidates.title: The Claim Lands Fast
candidates.hook: The strongest clip starts with a clear claim.
candidates.summary: A short self-contained moment with a direct hook and clean payoff.
candidates.transcript_excerpt: The strongest clip starts with a clear claim, builds tension, and lands a payoff the viewer can understand.
candidates.suggested_caption: Start with the claim. Land the payoff.

candidates.title: The Setup And Payoff
candidates.hook: Build tension before the answer lands.
candidates.summary: A longer clip that includes tension, explanation, and payoff.
candidates.transcript_excerpt: Build tension before the answer lands, then make sure the ending resolves the idea.
candidates.suggested_caption: The payoff matters as much as the hook.
